positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial and botanical arrangement. The design features intertwined lunar phases, glowing stylized flowers (like mandalas of blossoms), and elegant constellations rendered in thick, clean linework. The overall aesthetic should evoke the style of a modern engraving or woodcut print, emphasizing stark black silhouettes against a vibrant, deep midnight blue background. Strong contrast is essential. The composition must be perfectly centralized and repeatable, suitable for seamless printing on clothing. Use cross-hatching and dot-work patterns for texture depth. Cinematic, vector art quality, hyper-detailed, high contrast, occult elegance.
